claude_code_prompt:
APEX Media scene builder.

TASK: Output a valid JSON array (and ONLY that - no other text) of scenes for a {duration_sec:.1f}-second episode.

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Each scene is an object with keys: type, start, end, props
- "type" must be one of: TitleScene, CategoryScene, PieChartScene, BarChartScene, ListScene, BreakdownScene, StatScene, MistakeScene, StepScene, OutroScene
- "start" and "end" are floats in seconds
- "props" is an object with title, subtitle, text (strings)
- All scene durations must sum to {duration_sec:.1f} seconds
- Use exactly 6-10 scenes

props.title: Zero-Based Budgeting
props.subtitle: The Method That Actually Works
props.text: What if the reason you live paycheck to paycheck has nothing to do with how much you make?

props.title: The Real Problem With Money
props.subtitle: It's Not Your Income
props.text: Most people get paid, pay their bills, spend whatever is left, and two weeks later wonder where everything went.

props.title: 60% of Americans Live Paycheck to Paycheck
props.subtitle: Including Six-Figure Earners
props.text: Income is not the problem. The issue is what happens to your money after it hits your bank account.

props.title: What Is Zero-Based Budgeting?
props.subtitle: Every Dollar Gets a Job
props.text: Zero-based budgeting means your income minus all your expenses equals zero. Every single dollar is assigned a purpose before the month begins.

props.title: How to Build Your Zero-Based Budget
props.subtitle: Step by Step
props.text: Step 1: List your total monthly income. Step 2: List every expense and category. Step 3: Assign every dollar until you reach zero. Step 4: Track and adjust throughout the month.

props.title: Sample Budget Allocation
props.subtitle: Where Your Money Should Go
props.text: Needs 50%: Housing, food, transportation, insurance. Wants 20%: Entertainment, dining out, subscriptions. Savings & Debt 30%: Emergency fund, investments, debt payoff.

props.title: Top Budgeting Mistakes to Avoid
props.subtitle: Why Most Budgets Fail
props.text: Forgetting irregular expenses, not tracking small purchases, setting unrealistic limits, and giving up after one bad month.

props.title: Keys to Making It Stick
props.subtitle: Practical Tips for Success
props.text: Use a budgeting app or spreadsheet. Review your budget weekly. Give yourself grace when you slip. Adjust categories as life changes.

props.title: Start Building Real Wealth Today
props.subtitle: Your Money, Your Rules
props.text: Zero-based budgeting is the tool that breaks the paycheck-to-paycheck cycle. Assign every dollar a job and watch your finances transform.
